Common Behaviors:

Platform Behavior (Player):
  - Max speed: 200
  - Acceleration: 600
  - Deceleration: 500
  - Jump strength: 400
  - Gravity: 800

Physics Behavior (Objects):
  - Density: 1.0
  - Friction: 0.5
  - Elasticity: 0.3
  - Linear damping: 0.1

Sine Behavior (Floating items):
  - Movement: Vertical
  - Period: 2 seconds
  - Magnitude: 20 pixels

Bullet Behavior (Projectiles):
  - Speed: 300
  - Angle of motion: 0
  - Gravity: 0
  - Bounce off solids: Yes
